steps.title: Turn the data into points
steps.content: The input $t$ is years after 2000. The two points are $(0,5)$ and $(15,2.7)$, where the output is in millions of barrels.

steps.title: Find the rate of change
steps.content: The slope is $$m=\frac{2.7-5}{15-0}=\frac{-2.3}{15}=-\frac{23}{150}$$ The initial value is $5$, so $$f(t)=-\frac{23}{150}t+5$$

steps.title: Confirm the choice
steps.content: Choice C — $f(t) = -\frac{23}{150}t + 5$ has this negative rate and initial value, so C is correct.
